tagline: Precise optical configuration, deep-sky equipment assembly made simple
hero_headline: Back-focus off by millimeters? Thousands in gear, assembly failures?
hero_sub: Exact back-focus specs, complete adapter chains, mount load calculations—verify compatibility before assembly, avoid costly returns.
pains: Back-focus misalignment discovered only after assembly—expensive gear becomes dead weight
Adapter rings scattered across dozens of types and specs—piece together a single optical train from fragmented data
Equatorial mount load calculations are complex—oversized configs fail mechanically, repairs cost thousands

proof: Beta live now—early users guide which brands we prioritize in our database next.
cta_sub: Free during beta, continuous data updates, priority access to full adapter library

faq.q: How accurate are the back-focus measurements?
faq.a: Cross-verified against manufacturer datasheets, accurate to 0.1mm, continuously refined by user feedback.

faq.q: Will my equipment be in the database?
faq.a: We launch with major deep-sky brands, expanding monthly. Submit your gear to be added.
Data curation is expensive. Subscriptions fund ongoing accuracy checks, new brand additions, and continuous maintenance.

disclaimer: ⚠️ OptiMatch is an astrophotography equipment configuration reference tool. All parameters are derived from published manufacturer specifications and user-reported data, provided for informational purposes only. For actual optical configuration, always consult official manufacturer manuals and professional equipment advisors. Assembly errors remain the user's responsibility.
